nodes.name: 峡谷峭壁
nodes.summary: 大型猛禽和食腐鸟偏好的高崖栖息环境。

nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

nodes.name: Buff-breasted flycatcher
nodes.summary: Buff-breasted flycatcher（Buff-breasted flycatcher，学名 Empidonax fulvifrons），在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，常见栖息地包括峡谷峭壁。

links.label: 栖息于
links.evidence: inexpectatus: southern and south-central Honduras During the breeding season and in its year-round range the buff-breasted flycatcher inhabits wide mountain canyons with open pine, pine-oak, and oak forest that has a grassy understory with some bushes
